text: You have no idea what I'm capable of if you keep this up.
Cross me again and you'll regret it.
One more word and this ends badly for you.
I know where you sleep. Remember that.
Push me and see what happens.
Do that again and there will be consequences you can't take back.
That's not what happened, and you know it.
I was home all night, ask anyone.
I never touched it. Someone else must have.
Trust me, everything is exactly as it should be.
I have no idea what you're talking about.
You can believe whatever you like, it changes nothing I did.
Why does that even matter right now?
Let's not get into that, it's complicated.
I'd rather not say.
That's a question for another time.
Can we talk about something else instead?
I don't see how that's any of your business.
Do whatever you want, I'm not signing anything.
You can't make me say it.
I don't answer to you.
Go ahead and try. I'm not afraid of you.
I'll stand by what I did and I'd do it again.
No. And that's final.
It doesn't matter to me either way.
Save your feelings. Just answer the question.
I don't care whether it lives or dies.
Spare me the sentiment. Sign the form.
Your comfort isn't my concern.
Feelings are irrelevant here. Facts only.
